blocks.heading: The Edge-Native Factory

features.title: Cloudflare R2 & D1

features.title: Astro + DaisyUI v5
features.description: Zero JS by default, strictly typed CSS semantic variables.

features.title: Strict JSON Contracts
features.description: Frontend and backend communicate through immutable TypeScript interfaces.

blocks.heading: Our Services

services.title: Web Development

services.title: Custom APIs

services.title: SEO Optimization
services.description: Technical SEO strategies to rank higher and load faster worldwide.

testimonials.quote: Edge Zero cut our deployment times in half. The strict JSON contracts mean our backend and frontend teams never step on each other's toes.
The Tailwind v4 and DaisyUI 5 integration is flawless. We hand over white-labeled CMS dashboards to our clients and the frontend just works.
